ability.name: The Box
ability.description: Passive: Each second, deal 30/50/400 (APSouls) magic damage to all enemies within 2 hexes. Heal for 75% of the damage dealt by this effect. Active: Create a prison of walls in a 2 hex radius that lasts 5/5/60 seconds. While active, the Passive's damage is doubled. When an enemy touches a wall, they take 100/150/4000 (AP) magic damage. If there are less than 2 enemies inside The Box at any time, drag an enemy in.

beginnerTip.unlockTip: The Box drags enemies inside — combine with his passive AoE for free sustained damage
beginnerTip.kidExplain: Thresh is a ghost who carries a magical lantern and chains. His passive damages ALL nearby enemies every second AND heals himself from that damage. When he casts, he creates a Box — a ghost prison of walls. Enemies that touch the walls take damage. If fewer than 2 enemies are inside... he DRAGS another one in. He's the jailer who makes his own prisoners!

idealItems.reason: He heals from his passive damage — Warmog's HP means he heals more total from each pulse.
He's frontline and builds Souls — Stoneplate stacks armor/MR as enemies attack him in his Box.
His passive already damages nearby enemies — Sunfire adds a second burn layer to the same area.

ability.name: The Relentless Storm
ability.description: Bite the target and mark them, dealing 136/215/2117 (ADHealth) physical damage, increased by 60% if they are already marked. After casting 5/5/2 times, leap to a nearby hex, activating Stormbringer and dealing 272/430/4234 (HealthAD) physical damage to enemies within a two hex radius. Stormbringer: Gain 400/550/9999 Health and 50/50/999% Attack Speed. Every 2/2/0.3 seconds, summon a lightning bolt on a nearby enemy, dealing 98/161/1155 (HealthAP) magic damage. Takedowns summon a bolt on fallen enemie

beginnerTip.unlockTip: After 5 casts he transforms — fights are often won or lost at the Stormbringer moment
beginnerTip.kidExplain: Volibear is a giant divine bear god with lightning powers. He starts by biting enemies and marking them (extra damage on marked targets). After 5 casts, he LEAPS into battle and TRANSFORMS: gaining 400+ health, 50% attack speed, and summoning lightning bolts on nearby enemies every 2 seconds. He starts strong and becomes a storm god midway through every fight!

idealItems.reason: After transformation he has 50%+ attack speed — Rageblade pushes it to obscene levels.
His lightning bolts in Stormbringer proc on nearby enemies — Titan's stacks accumulate rapidly.
Stormbringer gives him 400 HP — Warmog's adds more HP that compounds with the growth bonus.

ability.name: Eye of the Ascendant
ability.description: Launch 10/10/99 arcane blasts randomly split between the closest 4/4/10 enemies that each deal 390/650/2500 (AP) magic damage.

beginnerTip.unlockTip: He fires 10 blasts between only 4 targets — they get hit multiple times each
beginnerTip.kidExplain: Xerath transformed himself into pure arcane energy — he's literally a floating being of power. He fires 10 arcane blasts split between the 4 closest enemies. Each blast does big damage. 10 blasts, 4 targets, they just keep getting blasted over and over with pure magic! He's pure artillery made of lightning.

idealItems.reason: 10 arcane blasts each scale with AP — Deathcap makes the total 10-blast combo devastating.
His blasts can crit — Gauntlet removes the crit penalty and makes each blast potentially critical.
135 mana is a huge bar — Blue Buff meaningfully accelerates how often he fires his 10-blast volley.

ability.name: Divine Challenge
ability.description: Dash around target and slash in a circle, dealing 110/165/1700 (ADAP) physical damage to target and 44/66/680 (ADAP) physical damage to all other adjacent enemies hit. If the target doesn't die, immediately cast again. If this Ability is cast 22 times in a row, instead slam on target, instantly killing them and dealing 220/330/3400 (ADAP) physical damage to all enemies within 3 hexes.

beginnerTip.unlockTip: If he casts 22 times in a row without dying, he instantly kills the target — keep him alive!
beginnerTip.kidExplain: Zaahen is a Darkin — a corrupted warrior-weapon. He dashes around a target and slashes in a circle. If the target doesn't die, he IMMEDIATELY casts AGAIN. And again. And again. After 22 consecutive casts on the same target, he stops slashing and INSTANTLY KILLS THEM regardless of HP. He's the 'never stop attacking ever' champion!

idealItems.reason: He casts 22+ times in a row attacking melee — Titan's stacks to max almost instantly for permanent power.
Life-steal keeps him alive through 22 consecutive cast cycles to reach the instant-kill threshold.
He kills enemies with his 22-cast execute — Deathblade stacks permanent AD from every kill.

ability.name: Mega Inferno Bomb
ability.description: Passive: Attacks are replaced with a bomb that bounces 1 time, dealing 40/65/500 (ADAP) magic damage to units hit. Active: Throw an enormous bomb at the largest 4-hex group of enemies that explodes on impact, dealing between 70/105/3000 (AP) and 550/875/7000 (AP) magic damage to enemies hit based on their distance from the epicenter.

beginnerTip.unlockTip: His mega bomb targets the largest group of enemies — cluster them for maximum damage
beginnerTip.kidExplain: Ziggs is a Yordle absolutely obsessed with explosions. His regular attacks are BOUNCING BOMBS (not arrows!). When he casts, he throws his MEGA INFERNO BOMB at the largest cluster of enemies. Enemies right at the center take maximum damage; farther away = less damage. He's the party planner whose parties involve everyone getting blown up!

idealItems.reason: His mega bomb can crit — Gauntlet makes the central explosion deal critical magic damage for massive burst.
Both his passive bombs and mega bomb scale with AP — Deathcap amplifies every explosive.
140 mana is high — Blue Buff meaningfully reduces his cooldown between mega bomb throws.

ability.name: Visions of the End
ability.description: Throw a Time Bomb on the nearest enemy without one. Time Bombs deal 90/135/1000 (AP) magic damage each second. When the target dies, they explode, dealing 150/225/4000 (AP) magic damage in a 1 hex radius and grant Zilean 15 mana. If a Time Bomb is on an enemy for 18/16/1 seconds and Zilean is alive, the enemy instantly dies.

beginnerTip.unlockTip: Time Bombs that sit for 18 seconds INSTANTLY kill the target — Zilean must stay alive!
beginnerTip.kidExplain: Zilean is an old man who mastered time travel — he's seen every possible future. He plants Time Bombs on enemies that tick down while dealing damage per second. When the target dies from any cause, the bomb EXPLODES and damages nearby enemies AND gives Zilean mana back. If a bomb sits on someone for 18 whole seconds while Zilean is alive... they instantly die. He's the patient death clock!

idealItems.reason: His Time Bomb ticks and explosions both scale with AP — Deathcap makes the 18-second execute trigger far more damage while ticking.
35 mana — Blue Buff means he plants Time Bombs almost every attack for rapid coverage.
His bombs tick damage every second — Morello's Grievous Wounds applies from each tick to shut down healing.
